offer: For accounting firms managing 10-20 clients, inefficient tracking of fixed assets causes delayed tax filings. We provide a fixed asset registry that depreciates equipment and generates tax forms instead of manual spreadsheets and outdated accounting software.
problem: Inefficient tracking and reporting of fixed assets for multiple clients.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms seeking solutions
Engage on Indie Hackers discussing similar challenges
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of asset details on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short user interviews for feedback
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing asset data
Facilitate one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
